info.name: HRHub API
info.description:
Complete API surface for HRHub — Auth, Employees, Recruitment, Visa, Documents, Payroll, Leave, Onboarding, Compliance, Dashboard, Reports, Notifications, Audit, Attendance, Performance, Exit, Assets, Settings, Tenants (App Management), and Connected Apps.

## Quick start
1. Set `baseUrl` (default `http://localhost:3000/api/v1`).
2. Run **Auth → Login** with your email + password. The test script saves `accessToken` + `refreshToken` automatically.
3. All other requests inherit Bearer auth via `{{accessToken}}`.
4. Use **Tenants → Switch tenant** to swap active organization (refreshes the token pair).

## Variables
- `baseUrl` — API root (e.g. `http://localhost:3000/api/v1`)
- `accessToken` — JWT (auto-set by Login / Switch / Refresh)
- `refreshToken` — refresh token (auto-set)
- `tenantId`, `employeeId`, `applicationId`, `jobId`, `documentId`, `visaId`, `leaveId`, `assetId`, `payrollRunId`, `payslipId`, `appId`, `membershipId`, `interviewId`, `performanceId`, `exitId`, `notificationId`, `templateId`, `userId`, `checklistId`, `stepId`, `assignmentId`, `maintenanceId` — collection-level helpers; set per request as needed.
